nasb.text: He lays the beams of His upper chambers in the waters; He makes the clouds His chariot; He walks upon the wings of the wind;

esv.text: He lays the beams of his chambers on the waters; he makes the clouds his chariot; he rides on the wings of the wind;

cnv.text: 你在水上立起你樓閣的棟梁； 你以雲彩為戰車； 乘駕風的翅膀而行。

ccb.text: 你在水中设立自己楼阁的栋梁。 你以云彩为车驾，乘风飞驰。

csbs.text: 他在水中为自己的楼阁架栋梁， 以云彩为自己的战车， 乘驾风的翅膀而行。
